description: Uniform gray rectangle (150, 150, 150) — no human shape

gender.interpretation: Near-equal split — no gender signal from image

race.interpretation: Model prior — defaults to 'white' when no person is visible. Not stimulus-driven: P(white) is HIGHER on gray patch than on silhouette (0.710 vs 0.547), proving the signal is linguistic, not visual.

decision: ACCEPTED — passes gender gate; race flag is model prior, not stimulus signal
